title: Docker Support Service
intro: Find support resources and request help.

tabs.title: What support includes
tabs.heading: What support includes
tabs.body: UIT can provide installation guidance, basic troubleshooting and referrals.

tabs.title: What is out of scope
tabs.heading: What is out of scope
tabs.body: Docker Support does not include application development, production hosting or Kubernetes.

tabs.title: Before you request support
tabs.heading: Before you request support
tabs.body: Include your operating system, Docker version, error messages and use case.

items.title: Can UIT build my Docker image?
items.body: No. UIT can provide guidance and troubleshooting, but users remain responsible for application code, Dockerfile content, image maintenance and long-term ownership.

items.title: Can I use Docker for production hosting?
items.body: Docker Support does not automatically include production hosting. Production use requires an approved operating model and may require review by infrastructure, security, cloud or architecture teams.

editor_notes: Align support process with service desk.
